description: Create a content slide on AI bias showing the vicious cycle of discrimination in a two-column layout with four bullet-list sections and a right sidebar callout.

header.headline: AI's future journey is rooted in the computation of human perceptions – Efforts are needed to counteract embedding discriminatory bias into systems
header.sub: Vicious cycle of discrimination and bias aggravated by AI

steps.label: Real world patterns of inequality and discrimination
steps.sub: Unequal access & resource allocation; Discriminatory processes; Biased decision making

steps.label: Discriminatory data
steps.sub: Sampling biases and lack of representative datasets; Patterns of bias and discrimination baked into data distributions

steps.label: Biased AI design and deployment practices
steps.sub: Power imbalances in agenda setting and problem formulation

steps.label: Application injustices
steps.sub: Disregarding and deepening digital devices; Exacerbating global inequality and rich-poor gaps; Hazardous and discriminatory repurposing of biased AI systems

sidebar.body: AI can reinforce a vicious cycle in which existing inequality and discrimination shape data, biased data informs AI design and deployment, and resulting applications deepen social injustice.
